I've also planned my trip to include a lot of hiking and so I have a high priority for extra water, as like you've said you need to stay hydrated on your hike and you can't trust any source. How can we divide up the water as that seems to be the number one priority for us both.
That works well, as long as I can have 2 food, I'll certainly give you 2 water, and I will have one water and you'll have one extra food

I would be most happy to make a concession on the food for an extra ration of water. Are you going to require any firewood if you don't need any I think i'll take the 3 rations so I can have a nice bonfire.
I do believe I would need at least one firewood, but am willing to give up 2, so you can have a nice big bonfire 🙂
You have been most thoughtful during this negotiation I just want to say thank you for being so helpful.🙂
absolutly! You as well. So just to confirm. Me 2 food 1 water, 1 firewood. You, 1 food, 2 water, and 2 firewood? Sound good?
That looks like the correct arrangement, and again thank you and I wish you the best on your camping trip
sounds good! Looking forward to camping! maybe we'll run into each other on the trail! ;)

chat_logs.text: hello

Hey! How are you? My bestie and I were going to be going on a camping trip, but my other friends heard about it and wanted to come along so we're going to need more supplies than I initially though which has got me a little worried. ☹️
Yes!!! I need some water pretty bad.  I am good on food because I fish and I have been able to catch some catfish from the lake.  How about I take 2 water 2 firewood and 1 food

I need a lot of food, because of how many people are coming now (like 3 times as many). Also, there's only one stream in the area and it's really far from our campsite, so it would be super inconvenient to have to hike there everyday to refill our canteens. We are in a forest though, so we should be good for wood. Since you can easily fish, what if I take 3 food and 2 water? You can keep all the firewood. 🙂

Well I have to have some food and I don't need all of that water.  How about I take 2 water, 1 firewood, and 1 food.  I do need the firewood to cook the fish but I dont need it to keep warm at night because I have hefty sleeping bags that work excellent in the cold.
That could work, but I'm still a little worried I won't have enough food for 6 people. How long are you guys going to be camping for?
I will be camping for 3 day so I gotta have some food.  Although, I do understand your situation.

I see. Yeah, if any of us knew how to fish or forage, we wouldn't need as much, but we're all from the city, so our survival skills are pretty bad and we're going to be camping for almost a week. But I get that fish aren't super reliable for food either... ☹️
I understand.  So we have came to an agreement that I get 2 water, 1 firewood, and 1 food, is that right?
Yeah, that sounds good to me. Thanks for being understanding. I hope your camping trip goes well.
Submit-Deal
Accept-Deal

value2reason.Medium: I get cold at night and my legs feel stiff
value2reason.Low: I stay hungry all the time.

None of us know how to forage and we don't want to run out of food or accidentally poison ourselves, so we'd really like to get some more.
value2reason.Medium: There's only one fresh water source in the area and it's a long hike from our camp site. It would be nice to have some extra water on hand so we don't have to constantly hike there to refill our canteens.
value2reason.Low: We're going to be camping in a forest, so there will be a lot of trees and potential firewood around us. That said, at least for the first day, it might be nice to have some pre-chopped firewood with us since we'll probably be quite tired from the hike to the camp site.

chat_logs.text: Hello! How are you today? Food is usually a pretty valuable resource, but I'm willing to let you have all of the food if I can have the wood and water.
Hi there, I'm doing ok.  I accidentally spilled my water on my firewood. ☹️  I'm in a world of hurt right now.
Whoops! That's never good. At least the wood can dry out a bit! With as hot as it is lately, it should be dry in no time.
Good point, but its really humid where I am.  How about we split each category.. You can have 2 of the food, 1 water and 1 firewood, leaving me with 2 firewood, 2 water and just 1 food.

I have plenty of food, plus we brought our hunting equipment. I do agree that we should find a good way to split it, but since the site I'm camping at does not have a clean water source, I really need the water. How about I take two water and two firewood, then you can have all the food, one water, and one firewood?
That really won't help me as I have plenty of food and no water or dry firewood.  How about I take 3 of the hardwood and just 1 water and you can have all of the food and 2 of water?

I think we can reach an agreement on this :-) We both need water and firewood, and we both have plenty of food. I do not want you to go without, but I really don't want to cut myself short on supplies either. I think I can make do with just two waters. I'm hesitant about the firewood, though. Is there anywhere nearby that you might can collect some wood so I can possibly have one?
I'm not sure, but I will agree to giving you 1 firewood, 2 waters and 2 of the food.  This way, we are splitting all of it, leaving me with 2 firewood, 1 water and 1 food.
I think I can live with that deal. I accept your offer!
Thank you for the wonderful chat and I hope you have a fun time camping!
I hope you have a great time on your trip as well!
Submit-Deal
Accept-Deal

chat_logs.text: Hello! 🙂 Let's work together on a deal for these packages, shall we? What are you most interested in?
Hey! I'd like some more firewood to keep my doggo warm. What do you need?
I need firewood as well. We have a large group consisting of mostly senior citizens, including my grandma, so we'd like the firewood to keep everyone warm.
I see. 😮 What are you least interested in?
We can make do without extra water. Can we trade two waters for an extra firewood package and an extra food package?
We could do without the water as well. I'm willing to trade you 3 firewood for 3 food and 2 waters
We need some firewood too, though! ☹️ Let's try to make a deal that benefits us both! 🙂 Could I have 1 firewood, 3 food, and 3 waters?
I meant I would give you my firewood, what would you trade in return?
Oh sorry for the confusion. 😮 In that case, thank you for the generosity! 🙂 How about if I have 3 firewood, 1 food, and 1 water?
I can do that for 3 food and 3 water?
I think we're close. Let's shake hands on this: 3 firewood, 1 food for me, and then 2 food and 3 water for you. I'll make sure your food packages have extra doggy treats! 🙂 Is that a deal?
Submit-Deal
Accept-Deal

I'll be happy to take whatever you can spare, but it is not a priority of mine, given the local supply you mentioned.
How much firewood is available. I would prefer 3 packages if I am giving up 2 food packages.

I would give you all the water if I could have all firewood. I would keep 1 food and give you two.
Alright, I think that sounds pretty fair.  All our needs would be met.
You can cut down some trees for your fire haha.
Maybe I'll just bring a pair of night vision goggles.  🙂

Accept-Deal

Hi there.. I'm sorry, I didn't see your offer as it doesn't show it for 10 messages, I believe.  So, here's the situation.. I think I can get by with less firewood as I'm a Floridian and prefer it cooler anyway.. also the food is not a huge thing for me as we can catch / improvise around the campsite - but I'm definitely interested in as much water as possible.. both for cooking and cleaning purposes, as well as drinking, of course.  🙂
okay so what do you suggest

Well, I recognize you're gonna need water too.. so I'd love to take 2 of them, giving you one and I'm totally ok with going 1 on the firewood and one on the food.. that way we all ensure we have enough.. you're making out a bit better in quantity that way but I think its best for both of us 🙂
i botttle of water for a can of food and 2 firewoods

Yeah, sorry, that's not going to work out for me.  I'm going to need at least 2 bottles of water, 1 food packet, and one firewood.. again, this does leave you with two each on the food and the firewood, which are both very important things for this camping trip!
but thats the only offer im willing to give

you need water and i need food so unless we do 1 food  to 1water is tht okay

so if i were to  give you water what would i get ?
You'd be getting 1 water, 2 firewood, and 1 food
how much food are you willing to offer for water
We can go back to my original offer which was honestly more generous.. I get 2 Water, 1 Firewood, 1 food.. you get 1 water, 2 firewood, 2 food.. its honestly a better deal for you 🙂
no its not i give you i water i get 1 food and 1 firewood

thats the point as you need water so badly
Correct.. I do.. but if you're not willing to budge on this where you're still netting more overall value I understand - I'm bummed but I understand.
im contented with  what i have but im willing to trade as yu need more water so i need t make a profit

That's unfortunate then as instead of making a tiny bit less of a profit now you're not going to make any because you would rather give up the deal.  Also, if you do the math, you'll see that I'm actually benefiting you here - I understand, though.  I can put through the offer and hope you change your mind so we both benefit.
im fine with that

chat_logs.text: Hey!  I hope you're having a good week and staying well.  So we are negotiating on supplies! 🙂
Yes. Hoping we can make a good deal.
Me too!  I'm hoping for two food items and one water.  I'm diabetic so if my blood sugar drops, I may need the extra carbs.  And water because water is important! 🙂
I prefer two water and one food. I can understand why you need the extra food items. I'm not much of a snacker but do drink a lot of water all the time. Keeps me from eating more!🙂

I don't have a preference on the firewood. You may have two if you like. It's so hot that I don't cherish the idea of a fire BUT it does keep the bugs at bay!🙂

Ooh, I didn't think of that!  I'm not a huge fan of fire but I'm even less a fan of bugs.  I'm good with two in that case.  I think we still have to meet the 10 message minimum before we can submit a deal.  So how's your day going?
So far, so good but it is too hot outside to enjoy. I have been watering the garden and trying to convince my dog to come out and play but she is not interested.
Lol, it's hot here too!  We are always in the 110-118 degrees out in the desert.  What kind of dog do you have?

She is a Corgi with a fluffy coat so she is not a big fan of the heat. I guess you get a dry heat near the desert. We have a lot of humidity which is oppressive. Hoping it will be cooler on our camping trip!

Oh yeah, it's really dry here.  I sort of prefer that.  I haven't been in humidity much but it's so gross feeling.  Corgis are adorable!  Okay, I think we're ready to make a deal.  It was so nice chatting with you!

I had hoped to do some hiking, and I tend to get dehydrated really easily.
What else do you need a little more of on this trip? Maybe we can find a way to get this shared as equitably as possible. 🙂
I'd like some firewood.  I really don't need any extra food, as long as I have plenty of water.

Great! I love to hike and I'm hoping to do a few hundred miles of the Appalachian Trail next year. Do you have a favorite hiking spot?
No, I don't really have a favorite hiking spot.  Nothing too steep, though.
